features: Each fragrance is made of layers of rich notes, unfolding to reveal a sublime and delicate experience, with the perfect blend of strength and softness
The Perfume is blended with magical French fragrances that capture hearts. The fragrance will enchant and captivate you.
description: Product description Bella Model Women's Eau De Parfum Spray 100 ml Box size. Women's Eau De Parfum 100 ml spray. Perfect gift. The perfume is mixed with magical French fragrances that conquer hearts. The fragrance will enchant and fascinate. - Each fragrance is made up of layers of notes that unfold to reveal a sublime and delicate experience with the perfect blend of strength and softness Directions Apply 2-3 sprays to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For longer lasting scent, apply to damp skin or use a moisturizer beforehand.
